3031360.name: WraithRun
3031360.description:
WraithRun is a dark cyberpunk first-person action game with classic arcade gameplay. Enter a high-tech labyrinthine prison constructed by machines for the purpose of tormenting you. Navigate these dystopian cyberpunk mazes, collecting orbs and power-ups while avoiding deadly drones known as wraiths. Collect all of the orbs in the level to advance. The game features 10 levels of increasing difficulty with fast-paced, challenging gameplay. Can you escape the mazes? Or will you be fodder for the machines?

Features:
  • Classic arcade gameplay with modern graphics.
  • Fast-paced thrilling gameplay.
  • 10 cyberpunk-themed mazes of increasing difficulty.
  • Intense electronic music soundtrack.
  • 4 types of enemies with different attributes.
  • Horror elements.
